problems.cause: Mix_1 is a subcomponent, not a port; AGREE cannot reference subcomponents directly in assumptions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace Mix_1.Port_1 with a valid port reference or remove the reference

problems.cause: Port_1 is not directly accessible in the AGREE annex scope; it must be referenced via a valid expression
problems.minimal_edit: Ensure Port_1 is referenced as a port expression or remove the reference

problems.diagnostic: left side of binary expression '=>' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool'
problems.cause: Invalid expression on left side of implication; AGREE requires boolean expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace invalid expression with a valid boolean expression

problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE requires all expressions to be typed; invalid reference leads to <error> type
problems.minimal_edit: Ensure all references are valid and typed

problems.diagnostic: right side of binary expression '=>' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool'
problems.cause: Invalid expression on right side of implication; AGREE requires boolean expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace invalid expression with a valid boolean expression

problems.cause: Mix_2 is a subcomponent, not a port; AGREE cannot reference subcomponents directly in assumptions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace Mix_2.Port_2 with a valid port reference or remove the reference

problems.cause: Port_2 is not directly accessible in the AGREE annex scope; it must be referenced via a valid expression
problems.minimal_edit: Ensure Port_2 is referenced as a port expression or remove the reference

executor_steps: Remove the invalid references to Mix_1 and Mix_2 subcomponents from the AGREE annex
Replace the assumptions with valid port-to-port signal flow expressions using only Port_1 and Port_2
Ensure the AGREE expressions are valid boolean expressions
